Operation 'sdk_v1_environment_document' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about what the document contains, who should use it, and what it returns. Added specific schema reference, authentication requirement, and use case context for AI agents to understand when to call this endpoint.

data.current_description:
Retrieve the environment document.
Used by SDKs in local evaluation mode, and Edge Proxy.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve environment document for local evaluation
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete environment document containing feature flags, segments, and rules for local evaluation mode. This endpoint powers Flagsmith SDKs and Edge Proxy for client-side flag evaluation without server calls. Returns a V1EnvironmentDocumentResponse object containing all features, segments, and their configurations. Requires Environment API Key authentication.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about what the document contains, who should use it, and what it returns. Added specific schema reference, authentication requirement, and use case context for AI agents to understand when to call this endpoint.

message: Operation 'sdk_v1_flags' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Missing summary. Description buries important details in notes. Reorganized to clearly explain default behavior, parameter effects, return types, deprecation guidance, and authentication. Helps AI agents understand response format variations and when to use alternative endpoints.

data.current_description:
Retrieve the flags for an environment.

---
*Note*: when providing the `feature` query argument, this endpoint will
return either a single object or a 404 (if the feature does not exist) rather
than a list.

---
*Note*: using this endpoint with an identifier is deprecated.
Please use `/api/v1/identities/?identifier=<identifier>` instead.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all feature flags for the environment, or a single flag if the `feature` query parameter is provided. Returns a list of V1EnvironmentDocumentResponseFeatureState objects by default, or a single object when filtering by feature name. Returns 404 if the specified feature does not exist. Note: Using this endpoint with an identifier parameter is deprecated; use `/api/v1/identities/?identifier=<identifier>` instead. Requires Environment API Key authentication.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description buries important details in notes. Reorganized to clearly explain default behavior, parameter effects, return types, deprecation guidance, and authentication. Helps AI agents understand response format variations and when to use alternative endpoints.

message: Operation 'sdk_v1_get_identities' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description is too brief and lacks input/output details. Added parameter context, specific schema reference, clarification that this is read-only (no modification), and authentication requirement for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Retrieve the flags and traits for an identity.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve flags and traits for identity
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves feature flags and stored traits for a specific identity. Accepts identifier and optional traits as query parameters. Returns a V1IdentitiesResponse object containing the identity's current flag states and trait values. Used to evaluate flags for a known user without modifying their data. Requires Environment API Key authentication.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is too brief and lacks input/output details. Added parameter context, specific schema reference, clarification that this is read-only (no modification), and authentication requirement for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'sdk_v1_post_identities' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing summary. Description lacks clarity about create vs. update behavior, request/response schemas, and side effects. Added explicit mention of idempotent behavior, schema references, and persistence effects so AI agents understand this operation modifies state and when to use it versus the GET endpoint.

data.current_description: Identify a user, set their traits, and retrieve their flags.
data.summary_suggestion: Create or update identity and retrieve flags
data.description_suggestion: Creates or updates an identity with provided traits and returns their evaluated feature flags. Accepts a V1IdentitiesRequest containing identifier and trait data. Returns a V1IdentitiesResponse with the identity's current flag states and stored traits. Side effects: Creates new identity if it doesn't exist, updates existing identity traits, and persists trait data for future evaluations. Requires Environment API Key authentication.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks clarity about create vs. update behavior, request/response schemas, and side effects. Added explicit mention of idempotent behavior, schema references, and persistence effects so AI agents understand this operation modifies state and when to use it versus the GET endpoint.

data.current_description:
Retrieve the environment document.
Used by SDKs in local evaluation mode, and Edge Proxy.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve environment document for local evaluation
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete environment document containing feature flags, segments, and rules for local evaluation mode. This endpoint powers Flagsmith SDKs and Edge Proxy for client-side flag evaluation without server calls. Returns a V1EnvironmentDocumentResponse object containing all features, segments, and their configurations. Requires Environment API Key authentication.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about what the document contains, who should use it, and what it returns. Added specific schema reference, authentication requirement, and use case context for AI agents to understand when to call this endpoint.

message: Operation 'sdk_v1_flags' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Missing summary. Description buries important details in notes. Reorganized to clearly explain default behavior, parameter effects, return types, deprecation guidance, and authentication. Helps AI agents understand response format variations and when to use alternative endpoints.

data.current_description:
Retrieve the flags for an environment.

---
*Note*: when providing the `feature` query argument, this endpoint will
return either a single object or a 404 (if the feature does not exist) rather
than a list.

---
*Note*: using this endpoint with an identifier is deprecated.
Please use `/api/v1/identities/?identifier=<identifier>` instead.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all feature flags for the environment, or a single flag if the `feature` query parameter is provided. Returns a list of V1EnvironmentDocumentResponseFeatureState objects by default, or a single object when filtering by feature name. Returns 404 if the specified feature does not exist. Note: Using this endpoint with an identifier parameter is deprecated; use `/api/v1/identities/?identifier=<identifier>` instead. Requires Environment API Key authentication.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description buries important details in notes. Reorganized to clearly explain default behavior, parameter effects, return types, deprecation guidance, and authentication. Helps AI agents understand response format variations and when to use alternative endpoints.

message: Operation 'sdk_v1_get_identities' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description is too brief and lacks input/output details. Added parameter context, specific schema reference, clarification that this is read-only (no modification), and authentication requirement for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Retrieve the flags and traits for an identity.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve flags and traits for identity
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves feature flags and stored traits for a specific identity. Accepts identifier and optional traits as query parameters. Returns a V1IdentitiesResponse object containing the identity's current flag states and trait values. Used to evaluate flags for a known user without modifying their data. Requires Environment API Key authentication.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is too brief and lacks input/output details. Added parameter context, specific schema reference, clarification that this is read-only (no modification), and authentication requirement for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'sdk_v1_post_identities' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing summary. Description lacks clarity about create vs. update behavior, request/response schemas, and side effects. Added explicit mention of idempotent behavior, schema references, and persistence effects so AI agents understand this operation modifies state and when to use it versus the GET endpoint.

data.current_description: Identify a user, set their traits, and retrieve their flags.
data.summary_suggestion: Create or update identity and retrieve flags
data.description_suggestion: Creates or updates an identity with provided traits and returns their evaluated feature flags. Accepts a V1IdentitiesRequest containing identifier and trait data. Returns a V1IdentitiesResponse with the identity's current flag states and stored traits. Side effects: Creates new identity if it doesn't exist, updates existing identity traits, and persists trait data for future evaluations. Requires Environment API Key authentication.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks clarity about create vs. update behavior, request/response schemas, and side effects. Added explicit mention of idempotent behavior, schema references, and persistence effects so AI agents understand this operation modifies state and when to use it versus the GET endpoint.
